title: Groups module live, GDS running, first VCs onboarded
content_html:
A significant update is now live on Cryptool.

Four things have shipped this week:

  • The Groups module is live and ready for investment groups and syndicates to run pools end to end
  • The Global Data System (GDS), Cryptool's project and vesting database, is fully operational
  • The profile and wallet pages are live, with WalletConnect support and a tested integration with Trust Wallet
  • The first VCs and launchpads have been onboarded onto the platform

The Raise module follows next week, bringing real transactions and paid subscriptions into the flow.

Try it now at app.cryptool.io. New accounts plug straight into the referral programme.
author: Cryptool
